verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I remember Lord When You came that day In Azusa street where hearts did pray People were sincere To let go of the world Dedicate their lives, devoted to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But where are we right now? What has happened with the message? That sweeps against the enemy - Lives that show very LIFE of You To a dying generation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Please don't let it be just a memory But let it come as a living reality I want to be back in those good old days of Yours

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Please let us be shining as can be Lord In our lives may you be a certainty I want to be pure as we stay in these dark days I want to be where You want me to In Your presence waiting for You Once more Lord, come to me I need You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I remember Lord When You first met me My heart was ablaze, and zeal was great Lord take me back In Your good old ways Conquer by Your Word, shout the victory

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: O let me stand right now Let me run Lord with the Message That sweeps against the enemy- Let me live the very LIFE of You To a dying generation

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For a time will surely come The message will be last preached, the call will be last called And I want to be ready of that day To be taken Lord with You
